Metadata.title: Aurevia Travel
Metadata.description: Premium international travel booking from Vienna for flights, stays, cars, transfers, tours, and visa support.

CookieConsent.label: Cookie consent
CookieConsent.title: Cookie preferences
CookieConsent.description: Aurevia Travel uses essential cookies for secure sessions and may use optional cookies for analytics after consent.

Home.title: Aurevia Travel
Home.lead: A premium travel booking foundation for international customers, built for flights, stays, cars, transfers, activities, and visa journeys.
Home.globalOpsText: Locale-aware, multi-currency architecture with secure Supabase-native data access.
Home.servicesLead: Each domain has a dedicated module boundary so supplier integrations, booking snapshots, and user flows can grow cleanly.

flights.title: Flights
flights.description: Search and booking architecture for global flight offers.

cars.title: Car rental
cars.description: Vehicle rental journeys with currency-aware pricing.

visa.title: Visa applications
visa.description: Document-aware application workflows for later phases.

Auth.title: Secure access
Auth.description: Authentication screens are reserved for the Supabase Auth phase.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.description: A reserved account surface for bookings, documents, invoices, and saved preferences.
Dashboard.cardBody: User-owned data will be protected with Supabase Auth and Row Level Security in the relevant feature phases.

Admin.title: Admin panel
Admin.description: A reserved operations surface for managing bookings, visa reviews, reports, and platform configuration.
Admin.cardBody: Admin actions will use server-only helpers and role checks before privileged data is accessed.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This page reserves the privacy policy surface for GDPR-aware customer flows.
privacy.body: The production policy should explain controller details, processing purposes, lawful bases, retention, processors, international transfers, data subject rights, and contact channels.
privacy.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.intro: This page reserves the terms surface for customer and platform usage rules.
terms.body: The production terms should cover account obligations, booking conditions, supplier roles, payment terms, acceptable use, liability limits, jurisdiction, and service availability.
terms.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This page reserves the cookie policy surface and links to the consent mechanism.
cookies.body: The production policy should list essential and optional cookies, purposes, durations, providers, consent choices, and withdrawal options.
cookies.reviewNotice: Legal copy must be reviewed by qualified counsel before launch.

refunds.title: Refund Policy
refunds.intro: This page reserves the refund policy surface for booking-specific cancellation and refund rules.
refunds.body: The production policy should distinguish supplier terms, platform fees, cooling-off exceptions, refund timing, chargebacks, and non-refundable services.
refunds.reviewNotice: Legal and tax treatment must be reviewed before launch.

Errors.notFoundDescription: The page you requested is unavailable or has moved.
Errors.errorDescription: Please retry the action. If the issue continues, support can investigate with the error reference.
